jee-advance-MOCK-1.subject: Physics
jee-advance-MOCK-1.text: A particle moves along a straight line with a velocity v = (3t² + 2t) m/s. What is the displacement of the particle between t = 1s and t = 2s?
jee-advance-MOCK-1.explanation: Displacement Δx = ∫v dt from 1 to 2. ∫(3t² + 2t)dt = [t³ + t²] from 1 to 2. Upper limit: (8+4)=12. Lower limit: (1+1)=2. Result: 12-2 = 10m.

jee-advance-MOCK-1.subject: Mathematics
jee-advance-MOCK-1.text: The value of lim(x->0) (sin x / x) is:

jee-advance-MOCK-1.subject: Chemistry
jee-advance-MOCK-1.text: For the reaction N2 + 3H2 -> 2NH3, the rate of disappearance of H2 is related to the rate of formation of NH3 by:
jee-advance-MOCK-1.explanation: Rate = -1/3 d[H2]/dt = +1/2 d[NH3]/dt based on stoichiometric coefficients.
